title: Caldera - System Information Discovery via Native Linux Commands
description: Detects use of native Linux commands to profile system hardware, OS version, and kernel details. Caldera T1082 emulation runs uname, hostnamectl, lscpu, dmidecode, and /etc/os-release reads to fingerprint the host before exploitation. This rule complements linpeas/linenum detection by covering non-script-based recon.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*uname -a*' or msg like '*uname -r*' or msg like '*uname -m*' or msg like '*cat /etc/os-release*' or msg like '*cat /proc/version*' or msg like '*lsb_release -a*' or msg like '*hostnamectl*')) or ((msg like '*lscpu*' or msg like '*lshw*' or msg like '*dmidecode*' or msg like '*cat /proc/cpuinfo*' or msg like '*cat /proc/meminfo*' or msg like '*free -m*')) or ((msg like '*lsblk*' or msg like '*df -h*' or msg like '*df -a*' or msg like '*fdisk -l*')))
